name: operator can mark a surfaced conflict as resolved with a justification recorded into the same log
command: mkdir -p pr-corpus && printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","existing_rule_id":"r-x","resolved":false}\n' > pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/resolve-conflict.sh" --pattern p1 --resolution accept-pattern --justification reviewed-manually --log pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl 2>out.txt && grep -q 'resolved=true' out.txt && grep -q '"resolved":true' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && grep -q '"resolution":"accept-pattern"' pr-corpus/decisions.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
